questions.question_text: Information to be published — Who's who in the practice

Cost — Details on NHS funding received and the cost of operating the NHS contract – as much information as possible, in as much detail as possible

Information to be published — Inspection reports by regulators. These are: The Care Quality Commission (England); Healthcare Inspectorate Wales (Wales); The Regulation and Quality Improvement Authority (Northern Ireland)

Cost — Inspection reports by regulators. These are: The Care Quality Commission (England); Healthcare Inspectorate Wales (Wales); The Regulation and Quality Improvement Authority (Northern Ireland)
